name: Document Profile Request

---

## Document Type

What kind of document should be supported.

## Reusable Structure

List the common sections, metadata fields, and formatting constraints.

## Why This Should Be A Profile

Explain why this is a repeatable document class, not a one-off custom request.

## Template Constraints

Describe the real templates this profile needs to fit.

## Example Inputs

Provide sanitized examples of:

- source materials
- images
- required fields
- expected output
